session.assistant:
pytest failed: Circular import error detected
**Error Summary:** The test collection failed due to a circular import in the module hierarchy.
**Root Cause:** - `erk/core/context.py` (line 25) imports `HealthCheckRunner` from `erk.core.health_checks.runner` - `erk/core/health_checks/__init__.py` (line 37) imports `ErkContext` from `erk.core.context` - This creates a circular dependency that prevents the module from loading
**Stack trace:** ``` tests/commands/doctor/test_doctor.py:8 from erk.cli.commands.doctor import doctor_cmd → src/erk/__init__.py:7 from erk.cli.cli import cli → src/erk/cli/cli.py:10 from erk.cli.commands.admin import admin_group → src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py:10 from erk.cli.core import discover_repo_context → src/erk/cli/core.py:4 from erk.core.context import ErkContext → src/erk/core/context.py:25 from erk.core.health_checks.runner import HealthCheckRunner, RealHealthCheckRunner → src/erk/core/health_checks/__init__.py:37 from erk.core.context import ErkContext (CIRCULAR) ```
**Location of issue:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/context.py` (line 25) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/health_checks/__init__.py` (line 37)
